decision_register.summary: YES. The zero edges bug is my recent change — in `build_session_graph`, I require `if child in G and parent in G` before adding an edge, but the handoff child sessions don't exist in the sessions-index (they were also compacted). I need to add nodes for sessions referenced by handoffs even if their `.jsonl` is gone.
